summary: Phase 10 Backend Testing Complete - All invoice routes migrated from server.py to routes/invoices.py are working correctly. 45/45 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment instructions templates routes properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/payment-instructions
Doula invoice CRUD routes properly migrated - GET/POST /api/doula/invoices, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/doula/invoices/{id}
Doula invoice actions properly migrated - POST /api/doula/invoices/{id}/send, /mark-paid, /cancel, /send-reminder
Midwife invoice CRUD routes properly migrated - GET/POST /api/midwife/invoices, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/midwife/invoices/{id}
Midwife invoice actions properly migrated - POST /api/midwife/invoices/{id}/send, /mark-paid, /cancel, /send-reminder
Invoice lifecycle working correctly: Draft -> Send -> (Paid | Cancelled)
Reminders can only be sent for invoices with 'Sent' status - validation working
Only Draft invoices can be deleted - validation working
No MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors - all responses properly exclude _id field
Role-based access control verified - Doula cannot access /api/midwife/invoices (403), Midwife cannot access /api/doula/invoices (403)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed invoices and payment instruction templates during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 backend refactoring complete. All invoice routes have been migrated from monolithic server.py to routes/invoices.py. This includes: Payment instructions templates (CRUD), Doula invoices (CRUD + actions: send, mark-paid, cancel, send-reminder), Midwife invoices (CRUD + actions: send, mark-paid, cancel, send-reminder). Server.py reduced by ~676 lines. All endpoints verified with 45 passing tests.

endpoints: GET /api/payment-instructions - List all payment instructions templates
GET /api/doula/invoices - List all doula invoices (with optional status filter)
POST /api/doula/invoices/{invoice_id}/send-reminder - Send payment reminder (Sent status only)
GET /api/midwife/invoices - List all midwife invoices (with optional status filter)
POST /api/midwife/invoices/{invoice_id}/send-reminder - Send payment reminder (Sent status only)

role_based_access.note: Doula cannot access /api/midwife/invoices endpoints (403), Midwife cannot access /api/doula/invoices endpoints (403)

objectid_serialization.note: All responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field - no serialization errors

mocked_apis_list: Resend email (may fail gracefully without valid API key)
mocked_apis.note: Invoice routes use real database queries. Email sending via Resend may not work in test environment but is handled gracefully.
